steps.title: Use the generation list
steps.content: The exhibition features works by Herrera and relatives from several generations: great-grandfather, grandmother, mother, niece, and Herrera herself. The blank must mean that the exhibition extends across that family range.

steps.title: Reject illogical verbs
steps.content: A would mean the exhibition takes five generations from elsewhere. C would mean it evaluates those generations. D would mean it fails to attend to them, contradicting the list of featured artists. The needed verb means covers or extends across. The answer is B.
